userStories.title: Shadcn Components Install + Auth Foundation
userStories.description: Install missing npm dependencies (vee-validate, @vee-validate/zod, vue-sonner), install all required Shadcn-nuxt components via CLI, create composables/useAuth.ts for JWT cookie management, modify composables/useApi.ts to inject Authorization header, create middleware/auth.ts for route protection, create layouts/auth.vue for centered login layout, rewrite pages/login.vue as a working VeeValidate+Zod form, and add <Toaster /> to app.vue. The useAuth composable stores the token in useCookie('koda_token') and exposes login(), logout(), isAuthenticated. The middleware redirects unauthenticated users to /login and authenticated users away from /login. The login form validates email format and min 8-char password, calls POST /auth/login, stores returned accessToken in cookie, and shows success/error toasts via vue-sonner.
acceptanceCriteria: bun add vee-validate @vee-validate/zod vue-sonner executed in apps/web and packages saved to package.json
All required Shadcn components installed via bunx shadcn-vue@latest add: button card badge dialog input textarea select label form table separator avatar sonner dropdown-menu
components/ui/ directory populated with all installed component subdirectories
composables/useAuth.ts created with token in useCookie('koda_token'), user in useState, login(), logout(), isAuthenticated computed
composables/useApi.ts modified to import useAuth and inject Authorization: Bearer <token> header on every request when token exists
middleware/auth.ts created — redirects to /login if not authenticated, redirects to / if authenticated and on /login
layouts/auth.vue created with centered card layout

pages/login.vue rewritten: uses VeeValidate + toTypedSchema(zod), email z.string().email(), password z.string().min(8), definePageMeta layout auth, toast.success on success, toast.error on failure, no console.log
app.vue updated to include <Toaster /> from vue-sonner
bun run lint passes with 0 errors
bun run type-check passes

userStories.title: Create useAuth composable
userStories.description: Create composables/useAuth.ts that stores the JWT in useCookie('koda_token'), tracks the current user in useState, and exposes login(credentials), logout(), and a computed isAuthenticated. login() calls POST /auth/login, stores accessToken, and sets user state. logout() clears cookie and user state.
acceptanceCriteria: composables/useAuth.ts created
Token stored exclusively via useCookie('koda_token')
User stored via useState
login() calls POST /auth/login and stores returned accessToken
logout() clears token cookie and user state
isAuthenticated is a computed ref derived from token existence

priorFailures.summary: Failed with tier balanced, escalating to next tier

routing.reasoning: Single-file composable creation with straightforward state/token management and API integration—standard feature work with clear requirements.

userStories.title: Inject auth header into useApi and create auth middleware
userStories.description: Modify composables/useApi.ts to import useAuth and inject an Authorization: Bearer <token> header on every request when a token exists. Create middleware/auth.ts that redirects unauthenticated users to /login and redirects already-authenticated users away from /login to /.
acceptanceCriteria: composables/useApi.ts imports useAuth and conditionally sets Authorization header on all requests
middleware/auth.ts created
Unauthenticated request to any protected route redirects to /login
Authenticated request to /login redirects to /

userStories.title: Create auth layout and rewrite login page
userStories.description: Create layouts/auth.vue with a centered card layout for unauthenticated pages. Rewrite pages/login.vue to use VeeValidate + toTypedSchema(zod) with email (z.string().email()) and password (z.string().min(8)) fields, definePageMeta({ layout: 'auth' }), call useAuth().login() on submit, show toast.success on success, and toast.error on failure. No console.log.
acceptanceCriteria: layouts/auth.vue created with centered card layout using Shadcn Card component
pages/login.vue uses VeeValidate with toTypedSchema wrapping a Zod schema
Email field validated as z.string().email()
Password field validated as z.string().min(8)
definePageMeta({ layout: 'auth' }) present
toast.success shown on successful login
toast.error shown on API failure
No console.log statements

userStories.title: App Layout — Sidebar + Header
userStories.description: Create layouts/default.vue with a fixed left sidebar (w-56) containing the Koda logo, Dashboard and Projects navigation links, and a bottom user display with logout. Top header contains a page title slot, dark mode toggle using useColorMode(), and user name/logout dropdown. Main content area renders <slot /> with px-6 py-4 padding. Mobile sidebar collapses via v-show with a toggle state variable. Update pages/index.vue to use the default layout via definePageMeta. Remove or refactor the inline nav in app.vue so it defers to the layout system.
acceptanceCriteria: layouts/default.vue created with fixed sidebar (w-56), nav links (Dashboard, Projects), bottom user section
Top header renders dark mode toggle button using useColorMode() — sun/moon icon swap
Dark mode toggle correctly switches class-based dark mode via colorMode.preference
Sidebar shows current user name from useAuth().user
Logout button in sidebar/header calls useAuth().logout()
Mobile sidebar toggles visibility via v-show and a local ref, not CSS media breakpoints
pages/index.vue updated with definePageMeta({ layout: 'default' })
app.vue updated to not duplicate navigation (renders NuxtPage inside NuxtLayout)
bun run lint passes with 0 errors
bun run type-check passes

userStories.title: Project List Dashboard
userStories.description: Rewrite pages/index.vue as a functional project list dashboard. Uses useAsyncData to fetch GET /projects via useApi(). Renders a responsive grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4) of Card components: each showing project name, key badge, truncated description, and a 'View Board' Button navigating to /${project.slug}. 'New Project' Button (admin only, top right) opens CreateProjectDialog. Shows empty state when no projects. Create components/CreateProjectDialog.vue: a Dialog form with VeeValidate+Zod fields for name, slug (auto-derived from name with toLowerCase/replace), and key (auto-uppercased, min 2 max 6 A-Z). On success emits 'created' and calls toast.success; on error toast.error.
acceptanceCriteria: pages/index.vue fetches GET /projects via useApi() with useAsyncData
Projects rendered as Card grid (1/2/3 columns responsive) with name, key Badge, truncated description
'View Board' button on each card navigates to /${project.slug}
'New Project' button opens CreateProjectDialog
CreateProjectDialog has name, slug, key fields with VeeValidate+Zod validation
Slug auto-derives from name input: lowercase, spaces to hyphens, non-alphanumeric stripped
Key field auto-uppercases and validates /^[A-Z]+$/, min 2 max 6 chars
Successful create: toast.success, emits 'created', list refreshes
Failed create: toast.error with message
Empty state rendered when projects array is empty
bun run lint passes with 0 errors
bun run type-check passes

userStories.title: Ticket Kanban Board
userStories.description: Build the kanban board feature for a project. Create pages/[project]/index.vue which reads the project slug from useRoute().params.project, fetches GET /projects/${slug}/tickets, groups tickets by status, and renders TicketBoard. Create components/TicketBoard.vue: a horizontally scrollable (overflow-x-auto) container with 6 status columns (CREATED, VERIFIED, IN_PROGRESS, VERIFY_FIX, CLOSED, REJECTED). Each column has a header with status name and count badge, a 'New Ticket' button in the CREATED column header, and a list of TicketCard components. Create components/TicketCard.vue: shows ref in mono font, title, type Badge (BUG=red border, ENHANCEMENT=blue border), priority Badge (CRITICAL=red, HIGH=orange, MEDIUM=secondary, LOW=outline), assignee Avatar if assigned; emits 'open' on click. Create components/CreateTicketDialog.vue: VeeValidate+Zod form with title (min 3), type enum, priority enum with MEDIUM default, optional description; POSTs to /projects/${slug}/tickets; on success toast + board refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: pages/[project]/index.vue reads slug from route params and fetches correct tickets endpoint
TicketBoard renders 6 columns in order: CREATED, VERIFIED, IN_PROGRESS, VERIFY_FIX, CLOSED, REJECTED
Each column shows correct ticket count badge
Tickets are grouped by status and each renders as TicketCard in its column
TicketCard shows ref (mono font), title, type Badge with correct border color, priority Badge with correct variant
TicketCard click emits 'open' and page navigates to /${slug}/tickets/${ref}
Assignee Avatar shown when ticket has assignee
'New Ticket' button in CREATED column opens CreateTicketDialog
CreateTicketDialog form has title, type, priority (default MEDIUM), description fields with VeeValidate+Zod
Successful ticket creation shows toast and refreshes board data
Board uses horizontal scroll for columns on narrow viewports
bun run lint passes with 0 errors
bun run type-check passes

userStories.title: Ticket Detail Page with Actions and Comments
userStories.description: Build the ticket detail page and supporting components. Create pages/[project]/tickets/[ref].vue: two-column layout (2/3 left, 1/3 right). Left: title, description (pre-wrap), status/priority/type badges, created info, CommentThread. Right: TicketActionPanel, metadata (assignee, created date). Fetches ticket via GET /projects/${slug}/tickets/${ref} and comments via GET /projects/${slug}/tickets/${ref}/comments using useAsyncData. Create components/TicketActionPanel.vue: renders action buttons based on ticket.status per the state machine (CREATED→Verify/Reject with comment, VERIFIED→Start, IN_PROGRESS→Submit Fix/Reject with comment, VERIFY_FIX→Approve Fix/Fail Fix, CLOSED/REJECTED→no actions). Each action requiring a comment opens a Dialog with a Textarea before the API call. API calls: verify (POST .../verify {body, type:'VERIFICATION'}), start (POST .../start), fix (POST .../fix {body, type:'FIX_REPORT'}), verify-fix (POST .../verify-fix?approve=true|false {body, type:'REVIEW'}), reject (POST .../reject {body, type:'GENERAL'}). Create components/CommentThread.vue: chronological comment list with type pill (VERIFICATION=blue, FIX_REPORT=orange, REVIEW=green, GENERAL=gray), add comment form with body (required) and type select.
acceptanceCriteria: pages/[project]/tickets/[ref].vue two-column layout renders ticket data from API
Title, description (pre-wrap whitespace), status/priority/type badges all display correctly
TicketActionPanel shows Verify and Reject buttons for CREATED status
TicketActionPanel shows Start button for VERIFIED status
TicketActionPanel shows Submit Fix and Reject buttons for IN_PROGRESS status
TicketActionPanel shows Approve Fix and Fail Fix buttons for VERIFY_FIX status
TicketActionPanel shows no action buttons for CLOSED or REJECTED status
Actions requiring comment (Verify, Reject, Submit Fix, Fail Fix) open a Dialog with Textarea before API call
Successful transition shows toast and refreshes ticket data
CommentThread renders comments in chronological order
Each comment shows type as colored pill (VERIFICATION=blue, FIX_REPORT=orange, REVIEW=green, GENERAL=gray)
Add comment form has body (required) and type select, submits to correct endpoint
New comment appends without full page reload
bun run lint passes with 0 errors
bun run type-check passes

userStories.title: Agent List Page
userStories.description: Create pages/[project]/agents.vue: a table-based agent management page. Fetches GET /agents via useApi() with useAsyncData. Renders a Table with columns: Name, Slug, Roles (Badge cells), Capabilities (Badge cells), Status, Actions. Status badges: ACTIVE=green (bg-green-100 text-green-800), PAUSED=yellow (bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800), OFFLINE=gray (secondary variant). Roles and capabilities shown as small Badge components inside the cell. Actions column has a DropdownMenu for admin users to change agent status (ACTIVE/PAUSED/OFFLINE) via PATCH request. Status change shows toast on success or failure. Add 'Agents' navigation link in the sidebar under the current project context.
acceptanceCriteria: pages/[project]/agents.vue fetches GET /agents and renders in Table
Each row shows Name, Slug, Roles as Badge list, Capabilities as Badge list, Status badge, Actions dropdown
ACTIVE status badge: green styling
PAUSED status badge: yellow styling
OFFLINE status badge: gray/secondary styling
Actions dropdown allows selecting ACTIVE, PAUSED, or OFFLINE
Status change triggers PATCH API call and shows toast.success on success
Status change shows toast.error on failure
Agents navigation link added to sidebar in layouts/default.vue
bun run lint passes with 0 errors
bun run type-check passes

userStories.title: Build and Quality Gate
userStories.description: Ensure the full Nuxt 3 application passes all quality checks: ESLint with --max-warnings=0, TypeScript strict type-check via nuxt typecheck, and a successful SSR build. Fix any remaining lint errors (unused imports, missing types, implicit any), type errors (unresolved composable types, missing generics, incorrect prop types), or build failures (missing Nuxt auto-imports, unresolved modules). Verify components/ui/ is fully populated. Ensure no @ts-ignore in new files and no hardcoded color values (text-gray-* patterns replaced with Shadcn CSS variable equivalents). Ensure generated/ directory is excluded from all checks.
acceptanceCriteria: bun run lint exits 0 with 0 errors and 0 warnings on all .ts files outside generated/
bun run type-check exits 0 with no TypeScript errors
bun run build exits 0 and output contains Build complete
No @ts-ignore comments in any new file under apps/web (except generated/)
No hardcoded Tailwind color classes (text-gray-*, bg-gray-*) in new files — Shadcn CSS variables used instead
components/ui/ directory contains all 13 required component groups: button card badge dialog input textarea select label form table separator avatar sonner dropdown-menu
All imports resolve correctly — no missing module errors

routing.noTestJustification: This story's verification IS the build toolchain itself — lint, type-check, and Nuxt build are the acceptance tests. Writing Jest/Vitest unit tests for a quality gate story would be circular. All behavioral code is tested in US-001 through US-006.

analysis: apps/web is a Nuxt 3 scaffold with nuxt.config.ts, shadcn-nuxt, @nuxtjs/tailwindcss, @nuxtjs/color-mode all configured correctly. runtimeConfig.public.apiBaseUrl is set. composables/useApi.ts exists but has NO auth header injection — it needs to be modified. app.vue is a basic inline nav layout with no <Toaster />. pages/login.vue is a raw v-model stub with console.log — must be rewritten. pages/index.vue is a stub with empty API call. pages/register.vue exists but is not in scope. No composables/useAuth.ts, no middleware/auth.ts, no layouts/. No components/ui/ directory — Shadcn components have NOT been installed yet. Critical missing npm dependencies: vee-validate, @vee-validate/zod, vue-sonner — these must be added before any form work. The generated/ client at apps/web/generated/ is produced by 'bun run generate' from the API OpenAPI spec and must not be hand-edited. API responses are shaped {ret: 0, data: T} so callers must unwrap .data. Auth token must live in useCookie('koda_token') — never localStorage. All pages except login.vue must be protected by middleware/auth.ts. Lint is configured with --max-warnings=0 on .ts files, generated/ already excluded. Type-check runs nuxt typecheck. Build runs nuxt build (SSR). Dependency order is strict: auth foundation → layout → project list → ticket board → ticket detail → agent list → quality gate.
